name: Citrene of Greater Dragonmarks
effectsRaw: +1 Enhancement bonus to Greater Dragonmark charges

name: Scourge of the Outsiders
effectsRaw: deal 4 to 24 Bane damage to Outsiders on hit. On Vorpal Hit: If an outsider struck by this weapon has fewer than 1000 Hit Points, it is instantly slain. If the outsider has above 1000 hit points, it takes 100 damage.

name: Meridian Fragment
effectsRaw: Once every three seconds when you take physical damage you get Psionic Universal Spell Power +8. This can stack up to three times (up to Psionic Universal Spell Power +24) and each stack lasts for 20 seconds.
sourceRaw: Fire on Thunder Peak, Warded chest

name: Dismagicka
sourceRaw: The Dryad and the Demigod, End chest and optional chest

name: Facet of Psionic Intrusion
effectsRaw: You also gain immunity to Mind-Altering Enchantments as if you were under the effects of the Protection from Evil spell
